createdashboard.name: CreateDashboard
createdashboard.description: Grants permission to create a dashboard

createscheduledreport.name: CreateScheduledReport
createscheduledreport.description: Grants permission to create a scheduled report

deletedashboard.name: DeleteDashboard
deletedashboard.description: Grants permission to delete a dashboard

deletescheduledreport.name: DeleteScheduledReport
deletescheduledreport.description: Grants permission to delete a scheduled report

executescheduledreport.name: ExecuteScheduledReport
executescheduledreport.description: Grants permission to execute a scheduled report

getdashboard.name: GetDashboard
getdashboard.description: Grants permission to get dashboard information

getresourcepolicy.name: GetResourcePolicy
getresourcepolicy.description: Grants permission to get the resource policy for a dashboard

getscheduledreport.name: GetScheduledReport
getscheduledreport.description: Grants permission to get scheduled report information

listdashboards.name: ListDashboards
listdashboards.description: Grants permission to list information about all of the dashboards for a user

listscheduledreports.name: ListScheduledReports
listscheduledreports.description: Grants permission to list information about all of the scheduled reports for a user

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list all of the tags for a resource

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to create a tag for a resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag for a resource

updatedashboard.name: UpdateDashboard
updatedashboard.description: Grants permission to update an existing dashboard

updatescheduledreport.name: UpdateScheduledReport
updatescheduledreport.description: Grants permission to update an existing scheduled report
